attestation: Independent review for this repo happens as fresh-context AI audit sessions outside GitHub (handoff audits). Those sessions leave no GitHub artifacts, so they earn no credit in the recorded-review dimensions above.

dimensions.label: Agent attribution & provenance
dimensions.detail: 296/300 commits have clear provenance (linked account, bot identity, or co-author trailer). Agent-involved share is reported as context, not judged.

dimensions.label: Recorded review coverage
dimensions.detail: 1/50 merged PRs received at least one review not authored by the PR author.

dimensions.label: Recorded review catch rate
dimensions.detail: 1/1 reviewed PRs had commits pushed after the first review and before merge (review produced change).

dimensions.label: Human merge gate
dimensions.detail: 50/50 sampled merges were performed by a non-bot account.

dimensions.label: CI test/eval gate
dimensions.detail: 1 workflow file(s) present (40pts). 91.9% of sampled merged PRs had all check runs passing at head (up to 60pts).

dimensions.label: Batch size
dimensions.detail: Median merged-PR diff size is 147.5 lines (additions+deletions). Small batches score higher.

dimensions.label: Lead time (first commit → merge)
dimensions.detail: Median lead time from first PR commit to merge is 0.1h.

dimensions.label: Plan-before-code evidence
dimensions.detail: 5/50 merged PRs reference a linked issue or plan document in the PR body.

dimensions.label: Audit-trail completeness
dimensions.detail: Mean of: substantive PR description ≥120 chars (49/50), review recorded (1/50), CI checks recorded (37/50).
